FeatureClassToFeatureClass CRD_all_reservoirs "G:\4 CRD\Figure\CRD database\CRD\CRD.gdb" CRD_all_reservoirs # "ID_12 "ID" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,ID_12,-1,-1;Name "Name" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Name,0,254;Lat "Lat" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Lat,-1,-1;Lon "Lon" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Lon,-1,-1;Province "Province" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Province,0,254;Prefecture "Prefecture" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Prefecture,0,254;County "County" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,County,0,254;Area "Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Area,-1,-1;STOR "STOR" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,STOR,-1,-1;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

SpatialJoin CRD_all_reservoirs barriers_2020_clean_SpatialJ C:\Users\xywang\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\MyProject20\MyProject20.gdb\CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2 "Join one to one" KEEP_ALL "ID_12 "ID" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,ID_12,-1,-1;Name "Name" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Name,0,254;Lat "Lat" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Lat,-1,-1;Lon "Lon" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Lon,-1,-1;Province "Province" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Province,0,254;Prefecture "Prefecture" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Prefecture,0,254;County "County" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,County,0,254;Area "Area" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Area,-1,-1;STOR "STOR" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,STOR,-1,-1;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs,Shape_Area,-1,-1;Area_KM "Area_KM" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,barriers_2020_clean_SpatialJ,Area_KM,-1,-1;BAS_ID "BAS_ID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,barriers_2020_clean_SpatialJ,BAS_ID,-1,-1;BAS_NAME "BAS_NAME" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,barriers_2020_clean_SpatialJ,BAS_NAME,0,255;DIS_AV_CMS "DIS_AV_CMS" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,barriers_2020_clean_SpatialJ,DIS_AV_CMS,-1,-1;RIV_ORD "RIV_ORD" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,barriers_2020_clean_SpatialJ,RIV_ORD,-1,-1;BB_DIS_ORD "BB_DIS_ORD" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,barriers_2020_clean_SpatialJ,BB_DIS_ORD,-1,-1;STOR_MCM "STOR_MCM" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,barriers_2020_clean_SpatialJ,STOR_MCM,-1,-1" Intersect # #

FeatureClassToFeatureClass CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2 "J:\4 CRD\CRD返修\CRD\CRD.gdb" CRD_v1 # "ID_12 "ID" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,ID_12,-1,-1;Name "Name" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,Name,0,254;Lat "Lat" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,Lat,-1,-1;Lon "Lon" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,Lon,-1,-1;Province "Province" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,Province,0,254;Prefecture "Prefecture" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,Prefecture,0,254;County "County" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,County,0,254;Area "Area" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,Area,-1,-1;STOR "STOR" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,STOR,-1,-1;DIS_AV_CMS "DIS_AV_CMS" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,DIS_AV_CMS,-1,-1;RIV_ORD "RIV_ORD" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,RIV_ORD,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_all_reservoirs_SpatialJo2,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

CalculateGeometryAttributes CRD_v1_all_reservoirs "Area AREA_GEODESIC" # "Square kilometers" PROJCS["Asia_North_Albers_Equal_Area_Conic",GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Albers"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",0.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",105.0],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",25.0],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_2",47.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]] "Same as input"

FeatureClassToFeatureClass CRD_v1_all_reservoirs "J:\4 CRD\CRD返修\CRD\CRD_V1.1.gdb" CRD_v11_all_reservoirs # "ID_12 "ID" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,ID_12,-1,-1;Name "Name" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,Name,0,254;Lat "Lat" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,Lat,-1,-1;Lon "Lon" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,Lon,-1,-1;Province "Province" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,Province,0,254;Prefecture "Prefecture" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,Prefecture,0,254;County "County" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,County,0,254;Area "Area" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,Area,-1,-1;STOR "STOR" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,STOR,-1,-1;DIS_AV_CMS "DIS_AV_CMS" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,DIS_AV_CMS,-1,-1;RIV_ORD "RIV_ORD" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,RIV_ORD,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,Shape_Area,-1,-1;RES_T "RES_T" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CRD_v1_all_reservoirs,RES_T,-1,-1" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
